title: Factors That Make Centene (CNC) an Attractive Bet for Investors
text: Centene (CNC) rides on continued top-line growth and numerous contract wins. Divestitures and an adequate cash-generating ability equip CNC well to invest in growth-related initiatives.

title: Centene's (CNC) Contract Win to Aid Nebraska's Medicaid Members
text: The Nebraska DHHS awards a contract to Centene's (CNC) Nebraska arm to continue serving the unmet need of the state's Medicaid members with a suite of better healthcare options.

title: Centene (CNC) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Centene (CNC) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: 4 HMO Stocks to Watch Despite Escalating Technology Expenses
text: A growing customer base and numerous contract wins might drive the Medical-HMO industry. However, high expenses related to technology advancements and a shortage of nurses will dampen margins.

title: Centene Subsidiary Selected to Continue Serving Nebraska's Medicaid Managed Care Members
text: ST. LOUIS , Sept. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today that its Nebraska subsidiary, Nebraska Total Care, has been awarded the Nebraska Department of Health and Human Services (DHHS) statewide Medicaid managed care contract.

title: Centene (CNC) Wins Contract to Serve Texas' Foster Population
text: Centene's (CNC) Texas subsidiary secures a contract to continue catering to the state's foster children and youth via its Medicaid plans.

title: Centene's Texas Subsidiary Announces Successful Reprocurement of Foster Care Contract
text: ST. LOUIS , Sept. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today that its Texas subsidiary, Superior HealthPlan (Superior), will continue to provide children and youth in foster care with healthcare coverage through the STAR Health Medicaid program.

title: Managed Medical Care Stocks Group Moving Up The Ranks
text: Managed health care stocks fall within the Medical-Managed Care group, which ranks a high No. 15 out of the 197 industries IBD tracks.

title: Centene to Present at Morgan Stanley Global Healthcare Conference
text: ST. LOUIS , Sept. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today it will present at the Morgan Stanley 20th Annual Global Healthcare Conference, to be held Monday, September 12 th – Wednesday, September 14 th in New York City.

title: Is Centene (CNC) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: CENTENE CORPORATION APPOINTS ASHLEE KNUCKEY AS CHIEF ETHICS AND COMPLIANCE OFFICER
text: ST. LOUIS , Sept. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today the appointment of Ashlee Knuckey as Chief Ethics and Compliance Officer.
